purpose: Assign unique numbers to user defined attribute in the sequence order to picked panels.

Content: Unique number to panels is commonly asked by the clients. To achieve that, we do it manually by opening the UDA of each panel and set the value. This application enables users to assign unique number to picked objects in the same order of sequence. Any change at the later stage can be done in User defined attribute

download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Unique Numbering under Application and Components.
Let the Application do the magic
